title: Deeper and Darker Material Pack for Basic Weapons
description: Material Pack for the Basic Weapons mod which adds warden weapons. This is a compatibility pack for the 'Deeper and Darker' mod
body:
### ৹ Requires the [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) Mod ৹ ![badge with the text "requires mod basic weapons"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3916821baec16a8354d4a97779a34d0b2e1c767.png) ### This is a materialpack for the Basic Weapons mod. #### Place it in the basicweapons_materialpacks folder in the minecraft root directory on both the server and client #### This folder is created automatically when running Basic Weapons the first time #
> Trying to install this as a vanilla resource or datapack will not function correctly. > Visit [www.khazoda.com/basicweapons/materialpacks](https://khazoda.com/basicweapons/materialpacks) to learn more about materialpacks, access the materialpack creator, and browse for other materialpacks. # # Warden Material Warden weapons' attack damage and durability are scaled to match the values of the Warden Sword from the Deeper and Darker mod ![warden weapon sprites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05967bd03e0ccc2cf579701f38136d1c48ec40ef.png) The warden material's stats are as follows: ```json { "material_name": "warden", "durability": 2519, "attack_damage_bonus": 5, "attack_speed_bonus": 0, "reach_bonus": 0, "enchantability": 18, "repair_ingredient": "deeperdarker:reinforced_echo_shard" } ```
